overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player moves from a busy multi-lane street under an elevated highway, transitions onto sidewalks past neon-lit storefronts, enters a narrow back alley with outdoor seating, and finally ascends a metal staircase into a building interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road under elevated highway

events.description: moves from street onto sidewalk, passing metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street under an elevated highway structure, moving past vehicles and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: delivery truck driving along the road parallel to the camera

entered.detail: large concrete overpass casting shadows over the street
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful anime-style characters
modern high-rise building with reflective glass facade
tropical palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure on a wide multi-lane road. Morning sunlight creates long shadows across the asphalt. A large digital billboard displays colorful advertisements ahead, while modern glass buildings rise in the background. Vehicles move along the road as the camera walks forward and transitions onto the sidewalk.

events.description: enters shadow of overpass structure, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and storefronts under the elevated structure

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground-level shop with traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk partially covered by the elevated highway above. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural sun and shadow. A corner store with distinctive red paper lanterns marks the right side, while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The street continues ahead with various storefronts and signage visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fast food restaurant frontage transitioning to alley

events.description: passes ScopHouse restaurant and enters narrower alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking past the ScopHouse fast food establishment and entering a narrower back alley with more pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and shorts standing near the restaurant entrance

entered.detail: fast food establishment with bright neon signage advertising burritos and digital menu displays
narrow passage between buildings leading to a back alley
illuminated sign showing food items and prices in red and yellow neon

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the ScopHouse restaurant with its prominent neon burrito advertisements and steam vents. The environment transitions from the main sidewalk into a narrower alleyway. Pedestrians stand around the entrance area, and the street becomes more enclosed with buildings on both sides. Parked vehicles line the right side of the narrowing passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with outdoor dining and neon signage

events.description: enters deeper alley section with dominant neon lighting and reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alleyway, passing outdoor seating areas and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table under blue umbrella in the distance

entered.detail: large yellow patio umbrella shading outdoor dining tables
blue and pink neon sign with Japanese characters indicating a hotel
external metal fire escape stairs attached to building facade
red plastic chairs and tables arranged under umbrellas

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into a narrow enclosed alleyway illuminated by vibrant neon signs including a prominent blue Japanese hotel sign. The space features outdoor seating with yellow umbrellas and red chairs. The environment feels more intimate and sheltered from the main street, with trash scattered on the tiled ground and various building entrances visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior building stairwell and upper walkways

events.description: enters building interior and begins ascending metal staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing an external metal staircase, moving from ground level to upper floors of the building

entered.detail: industrial metal stairs with open grating steps and railings
upper level walkway with metal safety railings
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along building walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions indoors as the camera ascends a metal staircase. The environment shifts to an industrial interior with exposed piping, metal grating floors, and artificial lighting. The view opens up to upper-level walkways and balconies connecting different parts of the building complex, with neon light glows visible through windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, sun-drenched urban thoroughfare into the intimate depths of a neon-lit alley and finally into an industrial interior. It begins under a massive elevated highway on a multi-lane road where morning sunlight casts long shadows across the asphalt and digital billboards glow against a backdrop of glass skyscrapers. As the camera transitions onto the sidewalk, the lighting shifts into a mix of sun and shadow, passing by a corner store adorned with red paper lanterns and various commercial storefronts. The scene then narrows as the camera moves past the steaming vents of a burrito restaurant and enters a sheltered alleyway filled with vibrant blue neon signs, yellow umbrellas, and outdoor seating. Finally, the movement shifts upward as the camera ascends a metal staircase, leaving the street behind to enter an industrial complex characterized by exposed piping, metal grating, and artificial light.
